allow: Bash(awk -F',' 'NR>1 { dur=$11; sp=$9; synp=$10; if \(dur != 2*sp+1 && dur != 2*sp\) print NR": dur="dur" src_per="sp" syn_per="synp; }' "c:/REPOS/PLUGIN_PROJECTS/AudioFileTransformer/OUTPUT/AudioFileTransformer_0/RD Processor Swapper/Grain Shifter/granulator/synthesis_grains.csv")

Bash(awk -F',' 'NR>1 { sp=$9; synp=$10; r=synp/sp; if \(r>2.0 || r<0.5\) print NR": src_per="sp" syn_per="synp" ratio="r" src_id="$1; }' "c:/REPOS/PLUGIN_PROJECTS/AudioFileTransformer/OUTPUT/AudioFileTransformer_0/RD Processor Swapper/Grain Shifter/granulator/synthesis_grains.csv")

Bash(awk -F',' 'NR>2 { id=$1; if \(id < prev\) print NR": id="id" prev="prev; prev=id }' "c:/REPOS/PLUGIN_PROJECTS/AudioFileTransformer/OUTPUT/AudioFileTransformer_0/RD Processor Swapper/Grain Shifter/granulator/synthesis_grains.csv")

Bash(awk -F',' 'NR>2 { id=$1; if \(id == prev\) print NR": id="id; prev=id }' "c:/REPOS/PLUGIN_PROJECTS/AudioFileTransformer/OUTPUT/AudioFileTransformer_0/RD Processor Swapper/Grain Shifter/granulator/synthesis_grains.csv")
